items.title: Confirm catch-up call with Boris Vaynberg re: fundraise timing
items.context: Email from Richie to Boris on Jun 10: 'Apologies for the delay here, Boris. Do you have availability this week?' Boris had offered Friday or Monday on Jun 3. No meeting appears scheduled yet on the calendar.

items.title: Prep for SMBC Cyber Security Trend meeting at Fin Capital SF office
items.context: Calendar event '(SMBC <> Fin Capital) Meeting for Cyber Security Trend' on Jun 15 at 11am PT. Attendees: SMBC (Yuji Ogata, Dawn Berry), Fin team (Logan, Jake, Derek, Fan, Daria). In-person at 1 Sansome St.
